steps.title: Identify the clause structures
steps.content: The clause beginning with “While the greater adjutant can be found...” is a dependent clause (starts with “While”). The clause beginning “more than 80 percent of this endangered stork species is found...” is an independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: A comma separates an introductory dependent clause from the independent clause that follows. “Pakistan, more” provides this required punctuation. Options B, C, and D violate this rule by using a semicolon, period, and no punctuation respectively. This matches choice A — A is correct.
